commands.command: node --import tsx apps/ui/personal-website-react/scripts/download-resume.ts && node --import tsx file_structure_to_json.ts ../../notes ./apps/ui/personal-website-react/public/assets/md-library/md-library.json && rsync -r --include='*/' --include='*.md' --exclude='*' ../../notes apps/ui/personal-website-react/public/assets/md-library/ --delete && rsync -ar --exclude '__init__.py' --include '*/' --include '*.ts' --include '*.go' --include '*.py' --exclude '*' ../grind-75 apps/ui/personal-website-react/public/assets/grind-75/ --delete && node --import tsx file_structure_to_json.ts apps/ui/personal-website-react/public/assets/grind-75/grind-75/ ./apps/ui/personal-website-react/public/assets/grind-75/grind-75.json

ensure-cf-project.command: npx wrangler pages project list 2>&1 | grep -qw staging-harryliu-dev-react || npx wrangler pages project create staging-harryliu-dev-react --production-branch main

deploy.command: npx wrangler pages deploy dist/apps/ui/personal-website-react --project-name staging-harryliu-dev-react

manual-deploy.command: npx wrangler pages deploy dist/apps/ui/personal-website-react --project-name staging-harryliu-dev-react

ensure-cf-project:production.command: npx wrangler pages project list 2>&1 | grep -qw production-harryliu-dev-react || npx wrangler pages project create production-harryliu-dev-react --production-branch main

deploy:production.command: npx nx build personal-website-react --configuration=production-env && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/apps/ui/personal-website-react --project-name production-harryliu-dev-react
